specific_question: What percentage of customer service representatives report they regularly need to talk customers through the booking process step-by-step in Q4 2024?
answer: In a Q4 2024 internal survey, 78% of customer service representatives reported that they often or very often need to provide step-by-step guidance through the booking interface, with representatives spending an average of 5.5 minutes per call just on booking navigation.
dr_question: A 2022 patient experience report found that six in 10 patients identified poor online booking tools and convoluted call centers as barriers to making appointments. When individual patients or corporate employees struggle to book appointments on MediConn Solutions' platform, how can I determine whether the root cause is poot booking tool design or convoluted customer support processes?
